title: Always Shield
description: Removes the obnoxious block delay of the shield, so it works the moment you press Right-Click. No more delay and confusion!
body:
![Titlecard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be74546299916cbc6f31099b7f232db158e14101.png) 
"Never be hit again with your shield up"
## Description Always Shield is a very small but **multi-loader and always up-to-date** QoL mod that removed the hidden delay of the shield that has often times made people confused about how did they got hit or exploded despite rising their shield just a second ago.
FAQ: Does it work on servers and singleplayer? Yes, yes it does. On both with no issues.
Yes someone has asked us that once (actually they asked Millie but still)
FAQ: How long will it be kept updated? Quote from Millie, team lead and maintainer of this project: "Until I'm 2 meters under"
Having issues, need to report a bug or just want to chat? Join our [official community Discord server](https://discord.gg/BcCDgnsCwQ)!
